command: echo '=== ALL POSTGRES ENV VARS ===' && docker inspect $(docker ps --filter 'name=postgres' --format '{{.Names}}' | head -1) --format '{{range .Config.Env}}{{println .}}{{end}}' 2>/dev/null | grep -i 'POSTGRES\|DB_\|DATABASE' && echo '' && echo '=== POSTGRES CONTAINER NAME ===' && docker ps --filter 'name=postgres' --format '{{.Names}}' 2>/dev/null && echo '' && echo '=== N8N DB CONFIG ===' && docker inspect $(docker ps --filter 'name=n8n' --format '{{.Names}}' | head -1) --format '{{range .Config.Env}}{{println .}}{{end}}' 2>/dev/null | grep -i 'DB_\|POSTGRES\|DATABASE' && echo '' && echo '=== COMPOSE FILES WITH POSTGRES ===' && find /opt -maxdepth 3 -name 'docker-compose*' -o -name 'compose*' 2>/dev/null | while read f; do grep -l postgres "$f" 2>/dev/null; done && echo '' && echo '=== EXPOSE 5432 CHECK ===' && docker ps --filter 'name=postgres' --format '{{.Ports}}'
intent: Get PostgreSQL credentials for MCP setup
